entities.description: Sam Walton, a young woman, is positioned in the mid-ground at the middle-left of the frame, wearing an áo hoodie Marvel Spider-Man.

Queen Elizabeth II, an elderly man, is positioned in the middle-right of the frame, wearing a pale yellow linen shirt, dark grey slacks, black loafers, with a silver watch and black-framed glasses. He is holding a Funko Pop Pikachu and looking at and leaning towards the woman standing next to him.
